name: drawio-code-skill
description: Generate polished draw.io diagrams from code — architecture, UML, ERD, flowcharts, ML/DL figures, and more.

plugins.name: drawio-code-skill
plugins.description: Generate .drawio XML diagrams from code structure, call graphs, class hierarchies, and system architecture. Supports 10,000+ shapes. Exports to PNG/SVG/PDF/JPG via draw.io desktop CLI.
